title: armeria caespitosa var. humilis
intro: Armeria caespitosa var. humilis, also known as Alpine Marsh Thistle or Dwarf Thistle, is a low-growing, perennial plant that belongs to the Plantaginaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Armeria caespitosa var. humilis include its ability to help alleviate congestion, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
